codeSystems.name: AdministrativeGender
codeSystems.title: AdministrativeGender
codeSystems.description: The gender of a person used for administrative purposes.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

codeSystems.name: CarePlanActivityKind
codeSystems.title: Care Plan Activity Kind
codeSystems.description: Resource types defined as part of FHIR that can be represented as in-line definitions of a care plan activity.

codeSystems.name: CarePlanActivityOutcome
codeSystems.title: Care Plan Activity Outcome
codeSystems.description: Example codes indicating the outcome of a care plan activity. Note that these are in no way complete and might not even be appropriate for some uses.

codeSystems.name: CarePlanActivityStatus
codeSystems.title: CarePlanActivityStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle.

codeSystems.name: CarePlanCategory
codeSystems.title: Care Plan Category
codeSystems.description: Example codes indicating the category a care plan falls within.  Note that these are in no way complete and might not even be appropriate for some uses.

codeSystems.name: CarePlanIntent
codeSystems.title: Care Plan Intent
codeSystems.description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a care plan.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTClinicalFindings
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Clinical Findings
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all the "Clinical finding" [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) codes - concepts where concept is-a 404684003 (Clinical finding (finding)).

codeSystems.name: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.title: DataAbsentReason
codeSystems.description: Used to specify why the normally expected content of the data element is missing.

codeSystems.name: CommonLanguages
codeSystems.title: Common Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: LinkType
codeSystems.title: LinkType
codeSystems.description: The type of link between this patient resource and another patient resource.

codeSystems.name: Marital Status Codes
codeSystems.title: MaritalStatus
codeSystems.description: This value set defines the set of codes that can be used to indicate the marital status of a person.

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTMedicationCodes
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Medication Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all drug or medicament substance codes and all pharmaceutical/biologic products from SNOMED CT - provided as an exemplar value set.

codeSystems.name: ObservationCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Category Codes
codeSystems.description: Observation Category codes.

codeSystems.name: LOINCCodes
codeSystems.title: LOINC Codes
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all LOINC codes

codeSystems.name: ObservationInterpretationCodes
codeSystems.title: Observation Interpretation Codes
codeSystems.description:
A categorical assessment, providing a rough qualitative interpretation of the observation value,    such as “normal”/ “abnormal”,”low” / “high”, “better” / “worse”, “susceptible” / “resistant”, “expected”/ “not expected”.    The value set is intended to be for ANY use where coded representation of an interpretation is needed.   
   
   Notes:
   
   This is being communicated in v2.x in OBX-8 (Observation Interpretation), in v3 in ObservationInterpretation (CWE) in R1 (Representative Realm) and in FHIR in    Observation.interpretation. Historically these values come from the laboratory domain, and these codes are extensively    used. The value set binding is extensible, so codes outside the value set that are needed for interpretation concepts    (i.e. particular meanings) that are not included in the value set can be used, and these new codes may also be added to    the value set and published in a future version.

codeSystems.name: ObservationMethods
codeSystems.title: Observation Methods
codeSystems.description: Observation Method codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 272394005 (Technique (qualifier value)) or is-a 129264002 (Action (qualifier value)) or is-a 386053000 (Evaluation procedure(procedure))

codeSystems.name: ObservationStatus
codeSystems.title: ObservationStatus
codeSystems.description: Codes providing the status of an observation.

codeSystems.name: PatientContactRelationship
codeSystems.title: Patient Contact Relationship
codeSystems.description: The nature of the relationship between the patient and the contact person.

codeSystems.name: ProcedureCodes(SNOMEDCT)

codeSystems.description: Procedure Code: All SNOMED CT procedure codes.

codeSystems.name: QuestionnaireAnswerCodes

codeSystems.description: Example list of codes for answers to questions. (Not complete or necessarily appropriate.)

codeSystems.title: QuestionnaireResponseStatus

codeSystems.name: ObservationReferenceRangeAppliesToCodes

codeSystems.name: HeartlandEvidenceLevelVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Evidence Level Value Set
codeSystems.description: All evidence level codes (established | emerging | pragmatic).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandImplementationTierVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Implementation Tier Value Set
codeSystems.description: All facility implementation tier codes (tier-1-minimal | tier-2-standard | tier-3-advanced).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandMonitoringObservationCodeVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Monitoring Observation Code Value Set
codeSystems.description: LOINC codes for the four observations captured by the HEARTLAND remote monitoring kit per Module 5: body weight (digital scale), systolic and diastolic blood pressure (BP monitor), and oxygen saturation (pulse oximeter, when indicated).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandMonitoringTrackVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Monitoring Track Value Set
codeSystems.description: All remote monitoring track codes (digital-track-a | analog-track-b).

codeSystems.name: HeartlandRiskTierVS
codeSystems.title: HEARTLAND Risk Tier Value Set
codeSystems.description: All risk tier codes from the HEARTLAND risk score (low | moderate | high).
